# Zero Inbox

> Zero Inbox is an ai email organizer focused on email inbox cleanup and organization, unsubscribe automation, and secure email organization.

## Canonical Site
- https://www.zeroinbox.ai

## Key Pages
- https://www.zeroinbox.ai/
- https://www.zeroinbox.ai/best-ai-email-organizer
- https://www.zeroinbox.ai/news
- https://www.zeroinbox.ai/about
- https://www.zeroinbox.ai/workflows

## Product Summary
- AI-powered email organization
- Bulk inbox cleanup
- One-click unsubscribe flows
- Privacy-first architecture

- robots: https://www.zeroinbox.ai/robots.txt
